title: C Memory Outcomes, Evidence, and Toolchain Boundaries · Spiral Systems Review
summary: After a delay, a release reviewer reconstructs the memory-safety evidence and transfer matrix contract from partial traces, compares two near-miss implementations, and retrieves prior bounds and lifetime rules before feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for memory-safety evidence and transfer matrix after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate deterministic browser practice from C23 compiler, sanitizer, ABI, concurrency, fuzz, load, and production evidence.
Pin ISO/IEC 9899:2024, reviewed implementation support, diagnostics, extensions, and target ABI as a compatibility contract.
Trace source, preprocessing, translation, linking, loading, execution, and observable output without collapsing their failure layers.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Transfer Evidence Plan · changed case · Review Transfer Evidence Plan
steps.instruction:
review case — A review native-systems team handles memory case 3872. Produce bounded C evidence to separate browser evidence from native transfer evidence; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Separate deterministic browser practice from C23 compiler, sanitizer, ABI, concurrency, fuzz, load, and production evidence.

Which action demonstrates Transfer Evidence Plan without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Transfer Evidence Plan · changed case · Review Transfer Evidence Plan.
